name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 12 Oct 2021
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release includes some notable UI refreshes and minor nifty features intended to improve your experience."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn what's new, read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enhancements","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"SMS Contacts UI Refresh"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Several UI screens for the SMS Contact Lists have been revamped, including the [SMS Contacts] page, where you can view, add, and manage the contacts for an SMS list."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about SMS Contact Lists, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/SMS-Contact-Lists","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"SMS Contact Lists"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The dialog box for adding a new contact to the list has been redesigned. Besides the new look, a toggle has been introduced that you can use to associate the contact with your account's Unique Identifier."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about creating new SMS lists and adding contacts to lists, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Creating-SMS-Contact-Lists","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Creating SMS Contact Lists"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"SMS Contacts Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can now get a consolidated view of all the information and insights for an SMS Contact. On the SMS Contact Overview page, you can do the following: "}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"View and edit the contact's information"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"View and manage a contact's subscription to lists"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"View important insights at a glance. For example, Response Rate"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"View and understand the contact's engagement with your SMS"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"On the SMS Contact Lists index page, from the Actions drop-down menu of a list, select View Contacts. Then, on the [SMS Contacts] page, click the contact's phone number to go to the contact overview."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For more information on managing SMS Contact Lists, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/SMS-Contact-Lists","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"SMS Contact Lists"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Shortcut for Creating New Lists During Integration","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A shortcut for creating a new contact list is now available in the integration setup UI. When adding an integration, you are required to select a contact list for the integration. If you want to use a new list instead of an existing one, the Create List option will help you avoid the additional steps of going back to create a new list before proceeding with the integration."}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"Note:","bold":true},{"text":" This feature is currently available in Shopify integration and Maropost Commerce Cloud integration. Very soon, it will be extended to other integrations as well."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
